title: Hoglian
body:
# Hoglian
**Impact**: 3

*Sister species of the Hoglins, they are strong and durable creatures of The Nether.*

**Icon**: `minecraft:cooked_porkchop`

!! needs [pehkui](https://modrinth.com/project/pehkui) to work !!

## Powers:
### Team Effort
You are a \"nether pig\", so mobs like zoglins and piglins dont attack you no matter what.

*\[\*\] original power by thearchitects6199. find the original here: <https://ptb.discord.com/channels/734127708488859831/825449766384828476/1130158155129683979>*
### Fungal Diet
You have adapted to eating what grows, so you can eat crimson fungi, warped fungi, twisting vines, weeping vines and shroomlight.
### Raging Nature
You don't like to get hurt. Every time you take damage, you become more infuriated! Be careful to not become overly angry, give out your rage.

*\[i\] Resource, maximal value: 50*
### Hoglinoid Build
You have big body, almost 3 blocks tall!

*\[i\] Pehkui scale multiplyer: 1.6*
### Home, Sweet Crimson Home
You start your life in the safety of the crimson forest.
### Tantrum
Let your rage out! Just run around at amazing speeds, and hit everything in your path!
### Tusks
Use your strong tusks to launch your opponent up to the sky!
